id.description: Unique identifier for this particular occurrence of the the error.

detail.description: Details about the error and potential solutions to fix it.

meta.description: meta object containing non-standard meta-information about the error.
meta object containing non-standard meta information.

links.description: Either self or related is provided.

pointer.description: JSON pointer to the associated entity in the request document causing the error.

parameter.description: A string indicating which URI query parameter caused the error.

errors.description: List of errors, each one with the following model

self.description: link that generated current response's data.

next.description: link for next page of data.

post.description:
Description

Returns keywords for which the queried ASIN(s) appear in Amazon search results. For a given keyword, Jungle Scout collects up to 3 pages of Amazon keyword search results. Query up to 10 ASINs at a time. Apply filters to narrow search results

parameters.name: page[size]
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Max 100

country.description: Amazon marketplace as a two character identifier (e.g. us, it)

primary_asin.description: The first ASIN provided in the query.

monthly_trend.description: 30-day keyword performance trend data compared to the previous 30 days

monthly_search_volume_exact.description: The number of times this exact keyword has been searched in the Amazon catalog in the past 30 days (excluding the plural form or misspellings)

quarterly_trend.description: 90-day keyword performance trend data compared to the previous 90 days.

monthly_search_volume_broad.description: The number of times this keyword and any related keywords (synonyms, phrases, etc.) have been searched in Amazon in the last 30 days.

dominant_category.description: The Amazon parent category for the top 10 ranked listings.

recommended_promotions.description: Estimation of how many daily units of this product you should consider offering for promotions in a 7-14 day period in order to reach the top 3 rank.

updated_at.description: The date the keyword was last updated

sp_brand_ad_bid.description: The estimated exact match Sponsored Brand Ad bid for a 90% chance win rate.

ppc_bid_broad.description: The Estimated broad match bid rate for PPC for the selected keyword.

ppc_bid_exact.description: The Estimated exact match bid rate for PPC for the selected keyword.

ease_of_ranking_score.description:
This score indicates the keyword ranking potential on a scale of 0 to 100, and represents how easy it is for new products to rank for this keyword. 
 Keywords with higher scores will rank easier.

relevancy_score.description: A high score indicating how closely related the keyword is to the seed keyword or ASIN.

organic_product_count.description: Total number of products returned on Amazon for this keyword

sponsored_product_count.description: Total number of sponsored products recently detected for this keyword

organic_rank.description: The organic position of the first ASIN for comparison (does not take into account sponsored ASINs).

sponsored_rank.description: The sponsored position of the first ASIN for comparison (does not take into account organic ASINs).

overall_rank.description: The first ASIN's overall positioning in the search results (including both organic and sponsored products).

organic_ranking_asins_count.description: Indicates how many of the competitor ASINs entered rank in the top 100 organic products for that keyword (excluding the first ASIN).

sponsored_ranking_asins_count.description: Indicates how many of the competitor ASINs entered rank in the top 100 sponsored products for that keyword (excluding the first ASIN).

avg_competitor_organic_rank.description: The average organic rank for the competitor ASINs you entered (i.e. the average rank of the ASINs compared to the first ASIN).

avg_competitor_sponsored_rank.description: The average sponsored rank for the competitor ASINs you entered (i.e. the average rank of the ASINs compared to the first ASIN).

relative_organic_position.description: The organic rank of the first ASIN for comparison relative to the other ASINs.

relative_sponsored_position.description: The sponsored rank of the first ASIN for comparison relative to the other ASINs.

competitor_organic_rank.description: Array in which each element is the organic_rank of a competitor ASIN.

competitor_sponsored_rank.description: Array in which each element is the sponsored_rank of a competitor ASIN.

asins.description: Array of up to 10 ASINs. If querying multiple ASINs, all comparison data points will be referenced to the first ASIN in the array

include_variants.description: Include (or exclude) ASIN variants when returning related keywords. Can result in many more keyword results. Default is `true`

min_monthly_search_volume_exact.description: Filter results by minimum exact match monthly search volume

max_monthly_search_volume_exact.description: Filter results by maximum exact match monthly search volume

min_monthly_search_volume_broad.description: Filter results by minimum broad match monthly search volume

max_monthly_search_volume_broad.description: Filter results by maximum broad match monthly search volume

min_word_count.description: Filter results by minimum word count

max_word_count.description: Filter results by maximum word count

min_organic_product_count.description: Filter results by minimum organic product count

max_organic_product_count.description: Filter results by maximum organic product count

post.description:
Description

Returns related keywords and data based on the queried keyword. Apply filters to narrow search results

parameters.name: page[size]
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Max 100

country.description: Amazon marketplace as a two character identifier (e.g. us, it).

monthly_trend.description: 30-day keyword performance trend data compared to the previous 30 days.

monthly_search_volume_exact.description: The number of times this exact keyword has been searched in the Amazon catalog in the past 30 days (excluding the plural form or misspellings).

quarterly_trend.description: 90-day keyword performance trend data compared to the previous 90 days.

monthly_search_volume_broad.description: The number of times this keyword and any related keywords (synonyms, phrases, etc.) have been searched in Amazon in the last 30 days.

dominant_category.description: The Amazon parent category for the top 10 ranked listings.

recommended_promotions.description: Estimation of how many daily units of this product you should consider offering for promotions in a 7-14 day period in order to reach the top 3 rank.

sp_brand_ad_bid.description: The estimated exact match Sponsored Brand Ad bid for a 90% chance win rate.

ppc_bid_broad.description: The Estimated broad match bid rate for PPC for the selected keyword.

ppc_bid_exact.description: The Estimated exact match bid rate for PPC for the selected keyword.

ease_of_ranking_score.description:
This score indicates the keyword ranking potential on a scale of 0 to 100, and represents how easy it is for new products to rank for this keyword. 
 Keywords with higher scores will rank easier.

relevancy_score.description: A high score indicating how closely related the keyword is to the seed keyword or ASIN.

organic_product_count.description: The total number of products returned on Amazon for this keyword.

sponsored_product_count.description: The total number of sponsored products recently detected for that keyword.

categories.description:
Description

Filter results by dominant category. If NULL, then all categories are included.

get.description:
Description

Returns search volume of the exact keyword in 7 day increments based on the data parameters

estimate_start_date.description: start date of the search volume data point period

estimate_end_date.description: end date of the search volume data point period

estimated_exact_search_volume.description: search volume of the selected keyword for the data point period

post.description:
Description

Perform a query of the Jungle Scout product catalog based on specified filters or query specific ASINs by using the Keyword attribute. Use resulting data to identify groups of ASINs that satisfy requirements for general product research. Results from only one Amazon marketplace per query.

parameters.name: page[size]
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Max 100

parent_asin.description: ASIN of parent product in marketplace

brand.description: Brand to which this product belongs

weight_unit.description: Unit of measurement for product weight.

dimensions_unit.description: Unit of measurement for product length, width and height.

number_of_sellers.description: Number of sellers for this product.

buy_box_owner.description: Seller that controls the Buy Box for this product.

buy_box_owner_seller_id.description: Seller Id that controls the Buy Box for this product.

date_first_available.description: First date this product was available for sale in format YYYY-MM-DD.

date_first_available_is_estimated.description: If true, this product's date first available is not available from Amazon and was estimated from proxy dates such as date of first answer or date of first review.

approximate_30_day_revenue.description: Estimated revenue from last 30 days. This is the result of approximate_30_day_units_sold * price

approximate_30_day_units_sold.description: Estimated units sold based on our internal models

subcategory_ranks.description: A list of subcategories this product ranks in, and its rank in each subcategory

rank.description: How high this product ranks in the given subcategory

fee_breakdown.description: A breakdown of the fees associated with this product

variable_closing_fee.description: Variable closing fee for this product

is_parent.description: If true product is a parent asin

is_variant.description: If true product is a variant asin

is_standalone.description: If true product is a standalone asin

ean_list.description: A list of EANs associated with this product

upc_list.description: A list of UPCs associated with this product

isbn_list.description: A list of ISBNs associated with this product

gtin_list.description: A list of GTINs associated with this product

variant_reviews.description: Variant rating count of the product. Only available if is_variant = true

updated_at.description: Date the product was last updated

seller_types.description: Filter by seller type (e.g. amz for Amazon, fba for fulfillment by amazon, fbm for fulfillment by merchant)

categories.description:
Description

Filter results by dominant category. If NULL, then all categories are included.

include_keywords.description: Filter by title keywords or by ASINs to include

exclude_keywords.description: Filter by title keywords or by ASINs to exclude

min_sellers.description: Minimum number of sellers (total of FBA, FBM, AMZ sellers)

max_sellers.description: Maximum number of sellers (total of FBA, FBM, AMZ sellers)

min_lqs.description: Minimum LQS. A grade based off an in-house algorithm factoring in the quality of title, bullet points, photos, and description.

max_lqs.description: Maximum LQS. A grade based off an in-house algorithm factoring in the quality of title, bullet points, photos, and description.

min_updated_at.description: Minimum updated_at date for a product in format YYYY-MM-DD.

max_updated_at.description: Maximum updated_at date for a product in format YYYY-MM-DD.

get.description:
Description

Perform a query for a specified ASIN over a period of time. Use this endpoint to determine price and rank data overtime with daily datapoints. Sales estimates for variant ASINs will return values for the parent ASIN. The parent ASIN values are an aggregate of all variants under that parent.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End Date Period. Must be before current date.

parent_asin.description:
If parent_asin is equal to the queried ASIN, the queried ASIN is a parent.
If parent_asin is different than the queried ASIN, the queried ASIN is a variant.
If parent_asin is null, then the queried ASIN is a standalone ASIN

is_parent.description: States if the queried ASIN is a parent ASIN

is_variant.description: States if the queried ASIN is a variant ASIN

is_standalone.description: States if the queried ASIN is a standalone ASIN

date.description: Date for the particular sales estimation, represented in format YYYY-MM-DD

estimated_units_sold.description: Amount of estimated units sold for the given date

last_known_price.description: Last known price for this data based on our scraped information

variants.description: Contains all the variant ASINs if the queried ASIN is a parent, provides an empty array otherwise

get.description:
Description

For a given keyword search on Amazon, return the share that each brand controls for the first 3 pages of search results. Data for organic, sponsored, and combined share of voice. This endpoint also returns the PPC bid and 30 day search volume for the queried keyword and the conversion rate of the top 3 ASINs for the last week.

estimated_30_day_search_volume.description: 30 day search volume for the exact match of the keyword

exact_suggested_bid_median.description: Estimated cost of winning bid for keyword in currency of the selected marketplace

product_count.description: Number of ASINs included in returned data

combined_products.description: Total organic and sponsored products within first 3 result pages for a given brand

combined_weighted_sov.description: Share of Voice with additional weight given to Amazon choice badge and products that appear higher on the results page for both organic and sponsored results

combined_basic_sov.description: Number of times a product appears divided by total search results for both organic and sponsored results

combined_average_position.description: Average position of all products of a given brand for both organic and sponsored results

combined_average_price.description: Average price for all products of a given brand for both organic and sponsored results

organic_products.description: Number organic search result products within first 3 result pages for a given brand

organic_weighted_sov.description: Share of Voice with additional weight given to Amazon choice badge and products that appear higher on the results page for organic results

organic_basic_sov.description: Number of times a product appears divided by total search results for organic results

organic_average_position.description: Average position of all products of a given brand for organic results

organic_average_price.description: Average price for all products of a given brand organic results

sponsored_products.description: Number sponsored search result products within first 3 result pages for a given brand

sponsored_weighted_sov.description: Share of Voice with additional weight given to Amazon choice badge and products that appear higher on the results page for sponsored results

sponsored_basic_sov.description: Number of times a product appears divided by total search results for sponsored results

sponsored_average_position.description: Average position of all products of a given brand for organic results

sponsored_average_price.description: Average price for all products of a given brand sponsored results

top_asins_model_start_date.description: Start date of Top 3 ASIN click and conversion data

top_asins_model_end_date.description: End date of Top 3 ASIN click and conversion data

clicks.description: Number of customer clicks within time range

conversions.description: Number of purchases within time range
